title: Monster Arena
description: AI-powered monster battler. Describe a creature, watch Gemini paint it, then fight through endless opponents. Evolve your monster with mutations after each victory.

title: Earth Atlas
description: Interactive 3D globe with country-level data overlays including life expectancy, CO2 emissions, renewable energy, and more. Built with React and Three.js.

title: Abalone
description: A polished 3D rendition of the classic marble-pushing board game. Features multiple camera angles, move previews, and complete rule enforcement.

title: Star Reaper '86
description: Retro side-scrolling shoot'em up with neon visuals, wave-based combat, boss encounters, and Xbox gamepad support.

title: Piano
description: 3D piano studio with MIDI playback, waterfall note visualisation, multiple camera angles, and tempo controls. Upload any MIDI file and watch it play.

title: Brighton Hub
description: Live city dashboard for Brighton & Hove with real-time transport, environment, crime, housing, health, events, and schools data from public APIs.
